item.title: I painted this oil painting of this little dog!
item.description: I painted it on commission! Both me and my client are very happy with how it came out! If you'd like to commission a painting or a drawing from me as well, contact me via my official website: anisjerbi.com Also, join my free live drawing lesson here at 5pm ET today: https://www.anisjerbiartist.com/registration-webinar
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #379
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: There's something fucky going on! I make no promises this will be investigated, I will be suspicious of this for ever.
item.description:
https://www.planetcritical.com/p/cyber-security-experts-warn-election-hacked
Too many bullet ballots
Percentages too high for bullet ballots in swing states
35 billion to 1 probability he would win 7 out of 7 with less than 50% of the vote.
We know they had access to the machines after 2020 election
Added their own code
Starlink !
The fix is in.
Less than a half a million votes needed.
They screamed so loud last time that it couldn't happen this time?
So we look at what history has foretold us.
No one wants to hear it.
Is there fight left for democracy?
Only you can decide if your willing to give up.
item.dc:creator: TheRedBaron8

item.title: What Duolingo doesn't teach you, I will
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/1-k71jcoOmE One of my friend insisted on me teaching then insults in French (my native language) so I made this video for them. I thought this was very educational and needed to be shared with more people. Enjoy the lesson and let me know what you'd like me to teach you next :) Have a good day, Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: I had thought that would have explained everything in the universe by now.
item.dc:creator: ArcadesCinza

item.title: That Same Ol Song and Dance Dump
item.description:
**Klangphonics ^ Happy Hump Day!
If you know any of these artists, drop their name and I will credit them accordingly!
I hope you're all doing well this week
**Left: Nati Dreddd. Right: Seth Staton Watkin Enjoy the tunes/performances!
Tenacious D - Heavy Metal
**@beholdyourfate on bandcamp! <3
.
Hell yeah
:)
.
.
.
Would.
.
A classic!
Hope you enjoyed this dump! I can't pole dance, but I can do other things °3* If you want to help a girly out financially and receive some fun pics/vids in return, message me! Thanks and see you Friday!
item.dc:creator: FlexxyLexxy

item.title: "Not like that!"
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/JusticePorn/comments/1gvthjt/make_doxxing_great_again/ Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO
